description: Machine-readable ownership manifest for OpenCode/OMO stack locations on this host.

role_markers.documentation: A path's role is determined by the most specific canonical prefix below. Marker metadata is descriptive and intentionally tracked only inside the control-plane repository; runtime homes and secrets must not receive marker files from this policy.
role_markers.runtime_marker_policy: Do not create repo-root .omo, runtime ~/.omo marker files, or auth markers. Runtime and secret locations are classified by canonical path only.

secret_or_auth.notes: Machine-local credentials. Never commit or edit from stack automation.

forbidden_zone.notes: Repository-root .omo is forbidden and must never be created or treated as valid state.

planning_state.notes: Tracked Sisyphus plans, evidence, notepads, and execution state.

control_managed_runtime_child.notes: Live config/plugin targets managed by install.sh; direct writes are denied by default.
